title: thanatoo #2289
definition:
1) to put to death
 2) metaph.
    2a) to make to die i.e. destroy, render extinct
    2b) by death to be liberated from the bond of anything,
        literally to be made dead in relation to (something)
nasbUsage:

 2) metaph.
    2a) to make to die i.e. destroy, render extinct
